name: qrpaydot-helper
description: QRPaydot Helper — local HTTP → RAW TCP (JetDirect) bridge for thermal printers. Merchant-Dash EXTERNAL mode.

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run publish:win
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run publish:win
scripts.build:win: cross-env PRINT_BRIDGE_BUILD_PROFILE=production node scripts/write-embed-backend-api.cjs && npm run panel:build && electron-builder --win --dir && cross-env PRINT_BRIDGE_BUILD_PROFILE=development node scripts/write-embed-backend-api.cjs
scripts.build:installer: cross-env PRINT_BRIDGE_BUILD_PROFILE=production node scripts/write-embed-backend-api.cjs && npm run panel:build && electron-builder --win nsis && cross-env PRINT_BRIDGE_BUILD_PROFILE=development node scripts/write-embed-backend-api.cjs
scripts.publish:win: cross-env PRINT_BRIDGE_BUILD_PROFILE=production node scripts/write-embed-backend-api.cjs && npm run panel:build && cross-env EP_DRAFT=false EP_PRE_RELEASE=false EP_GH_IGNORE_TIME=true dotenv -- electron-builder --win nsis --publish always && cross-env PRINT_BRIDGE_BUILD_PROFILE=development node scripts/write-embed-backend-api.cjs
